sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96087" key="spoudaio/muqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπουδαιό-μῡθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96087.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">able to speak seriously</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">104</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
